title: Acceptance criteria
description:
- `frontend/` initialised with Vite (React + TypeScript template)
- Mantine v7 installed (`@mantine/core`, `@mantine/hooks`, `@emotion/react`)
- `frontend/src/theme.ts` exports the ScorePlay theme from CLAUDE.md §6
- `MantineProvider` wraps the app with the theme + `defaultColorScheme="dark"`
- Page calls `/api/health` (via Vite dev proxy → backend `:8080/health`), displays response
- `frontend/Dockerfile` multi-stage: build with Node, serve with nginx on port 80
- Vite proxy configured so `/api/*` → `http://backend:8080/*` in dev

title: Goal
description: Bootstrap a Vite + React + Mantine app that calls /health.

title: Verification
description:
From clean checkout: `docker compose up --build` brings all three services up.
`curl localhost:8080/health` returns 200.
Browser at `localhost:5173` shows the frontend, which displays the /health response.
`docker compose down` shuts cleanly. `pgdata/` is preserved on disk.

title: Goal
description: One `docker compose up --build` brings up the full stack.

title: Acceptance criteria
description:
- `docker-compose.yml` at repo root with three services:
  - `postgres`: image `pgvector/pgvector:pg16`, env `POSTGRES_USER=loggingstudio`, `POSTGRES_PASSWORD=loggingstudio`, `POSTGRES_DB=loggingstudio`, volume `./pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data`, port `5432` exposed
  - `backend`: built from `./backend`, env `DATABASE_URL=postgres://loggingstudio:loggingstudio@postgres:5432/loggingstudio?sslmode=disable`, depends_on postgres (healthy), volume `./watch:/watch`, port `8080`
  - `frontend`: built from `./frontend`, depends_on backend, port `5173:80`
- Postgres healthcheck so backend waits for db ready
- All services share a network named `loggingstudio`

title: Verification
description:
`docker build -t loggingstudio-frontend ./frontend` succeeds.
Dev mode: `pnpm dev` (or `npm run dev`) inside frontend/ serves at `:5173` and the page renders with the dark theme.

title: Acceptance criteria
description:
- `backend/go.mod` initialised (module name: `github.com/zav1995/loggingstudio/backend`)
- Gin added as a dependency
- `backend/cmd/server/main.go` exposes `GET /health` returning `{"ok": true, "ts": "<iso8601>"}`
- `backend/Dockerfile` (multi-stage: build with `golang:1.22`, run with `alpine` or `distroless`)
- Listens on `:8080`

title: Acceptance criteria
description:
- Directories exist: `backend/`, `frontend/`, `shared/`, `watch/`, `pgdata/`
- `pgdata/` and `watch/processed/`, `watch/rejected/` are in `.gitignore`
- `.gitkeep` files in `shared/`, `watch/`, `backend/`, `frontend/` so empty dirs are tracked
- `.gitignore` updated to exclude `pgdata/`, `node_modules/`, `*.log`, `.env`, `.DS_Store`

title: Verification
description:
`docker build -t loggingstudio-backend ./backend` succeeds.
`docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 loggingstudio-backend` starts and `curl localhost:8080/health` returns 200 with the expected JSON.

title: Verification
description: `ls -la` shows the directories. `git status` shows them tracked (via .gitkeep).

title: Goal
description: Create top-level directory structure for the project.

title: Goal
description: Bootstrap a minimal Go service that returns a health check.
